__fixture__.name: resume_live_managed_cloud_card
__fixture__.scenario: A workspace-switcher card for a managed-cloud workspace whose managed-workspace state is ready and whose attach_authority_class is authority_live. The card demonstrates the four-lane separation required by §3.5 rule 1: resume_live_workspace (default), start_from_snapshot (reopen from the latest prebuild / snapshot), clone_fresh_repository (clone the source fresh, no starter), and open_without_starter (bypass). The resume-live lane carries only remote_attach_handshake; no mutating bootstrap items are enqueued (§3.5 rule 2). declared_freshness_class is live_origin on the live-session metadata; attach_authority_class is authority_live. bypass.open_folder_without_starter and bypass.clone_repository_without_starter render at equal weight. Demonstrates §3.5 (lifecycle class rules), §7 (resume-live card record), §7.2 (lane-separation rules), §11.10 (four-lane separation).
contract_sections: §13.7 Resume-live managed-cloud card with four lanes

alternative_lanes.presentation_subtitle: Reattach to the running managed-cloud workspace · seconds · no setup re-run.
Detach from the live session · attach the latest prebuild snapshot · no cold package restore.
Clone the underlying repository locally with no starter · review before commit.
Open the locally materialized folder with no starter attached.

presentation_subtitle: Authority live · Resume live, Reopen from prebuild, Clone fresh, Open without starter — four distinct lanes at equal weight.
